_note: Freeman Chiropractic — single-category (Chiropractic), 2 practitioners, 1 location (Perth). Global gate clinic. Existing patient auto-routes to Standard Adjustment — no variant question, no MENU_LIST.
gate_question_self: Have you been to the clinic before?
gate_question_other: Have they been to the clinic before?
menu_list: We offer chiropractic adjustments and consultations.

new_patient.verbatim_script: As you're new to the clinic, I'll get you booked in for a new patient consultation -- our chiropractors will take it from there.

categories.name: Chiropractic
categories._note: Single category, no variant question. Existing patients always route to Standard Adjustment. New patients always route to Initial Consultation (global gate).
